title: Road Transport
subtitle: Pan India Coverage
heroDescription: PTC Logistics offers comprehensive Pan India road transport services, connecting major cities, industrial zones, ports, and warehouses with speed and reliability.
shortDescription: Pan India road transport connecting cities, industrial zones, ports and warehouses with full and part load options.

benefits.title: Extensive Network
benefits.desc: Covering 200+ cities and towns across India

benefits.title: GPS Tracking
benefits.desc: Real-time shipment tracking for complete visibility

benefits.title: Flexible Options
benefits.desc: FTL and LTL solutions to match your cargo size

benefits.title: Timely Delivery
benefits.desc: Committed delivery timelines with professional drivers

title: Air Freight
subtitle: Fast & Secure
heroDescription: Our air freight services are designed for fast and secure transportation of urgent shipments both domestically and internationally, with complete documentation support.
shortDescription: Fast and secure air cargo services for domestic and international shipments with express handling and tracking.

benefits.title: Speed
benefits.desc: Fastest mode of transport for urgent shipments

benefits.title: Documentation
benefits.desc: Complete AWB and customs documentation support

title: Sea Freight
subtitle: Cost-Effective Global
heroDescription: PTC Logistics offers cost-effective international sea freight services for bulk and commercial cargo, providing reliable shipping solutions for global trade.
shortDescription: Cost-effective sea freight for bulk cargo with FCL and LCL options, complete port documentation and global forwarding.

benefits.title: Cost Effective
benefits.desc: Most economical option for large volume shipments

benefits.title: High Capacity
benefits.desc: Handles oversized, heavy, and bulk cargo

benefits.title: Port Coverage
benefits.desc: Major Indian ports: JNPT, Mundra, Chennai, Kolkata

benefits.title: Global Trade
benefits.desc: Connecting India to Asia, Europe, Americas & Africa

title: Import & Export
subtitle: Custom Clearance & Trade
heroDescription: PTC Logistics assists businesses with complete import and export logistics support, ensuring smooth cargo movement between countries with expert documentation and customs handling.
shortDescription: End-to-end import/export logistics with customs clearance, documentation, and freight forwarding solutions.

benefits.title: Expert Compliance
benefits.desc: Up-to-date with EXIM policies and trade regulations

benefits.title: Documentation
benefits.desc: Complete paperwork from invoice to Bill of Lading

benefits.title: End-to-End
benefits.desc: Single point of contact from origin to destination
